overview.description: The Franklin International Aggregate Bond ETF (FLIA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in government, agency, and corporate debt outside of the United States. FLIA was launched on May 30, 2018 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
